summary: Plan-only PR remediation shard. No GitHub mutations are planned because comment/close/label mutations are blocked, merge preflight is incomplete for every open PR, and review-bot/comment hydration plus Codex /review proof are absent. Each PR is classified independently against the hydrated artifact state.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR, but it needs narrow branch repair and complete merge preflight before merge.
Plausible maintainer-editable PR, but compatibility/message-delivery risk labels and missing preflight require repair/final review before merge.
Useful focused PR, but merge cannot be recommended without full comment/review-bot hydration, mergeability, and Codex /review proof.
Small concrete contributor PR suitable for final repair/review, but missing mergeability and review preflight prevents merge_candidate.
Active author follow-up and broad availability-affecting config-watch changes require maintainer judgment before repair or merge planning.

needs_human: #90653: decide whether to wait for the author or authorize maintainer repair despite status: waiting on author and broad availability-risk changes.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair/finalization plan for four useful maintainer-editable contributor PRs whose merge preflight is incomplete; leave #90653 for maintainer judgment.
repair_candidate.pr_body: This plan does not open a replacement PR yet. It identifies four contributor PRs that are useful but blocked from merge by incomplete preflight: #90745, #90749, #90750, and #90902. A follow-up repair run should preserve source PR attribution, hydrate comments and review-bot findings, repair failing checks where present, run targeted tests plus pnpm check:changed, run Codex /review, and then emit merge preflight. #90653 is held for maintainer judgment because it is waiting on author and is a broad availability-sensitive gateway config-watch change.
validation_commands: For #90745: repair failing lint/bundled extension checks, then run pnpm check:changed and targeted runtime-context-prompt/prompt-prelude tests; run Codex /review before merge.
For #90749: run pnpm exec vitest run extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.test.ts plus gateway protocol/talk targeted tests; run pnpm check:changed and Codex /review before merge.
For #90750: run targeted diagnostics, reply-run registry, diagnostics-otel, and diagnostics-prometheus tests; run pnpm check:changed and Codex /review before merge.
For #90902: run pnpm exec vitest run src/mcp/plugin-tools-serve.test.ts; run pnpm check:changed and Codex /review before merge.
Before any merge: hydrate comments, review comments, and review-bot comments; verify mergeability against current main; confirm security-sensitive status remains cleared.
